channel.title: New York - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Brewery Ommegang: Iron Throne, Ep. 185
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we head to the evil House Lannister, and the family that ruled Westeros at the conclusion of season two of the HBO hit series Game of Thrones! In collaboration with HBO, Brewery Ommegang created Iron Throne Blonde Ale to match the color of Lannisters’ hair . Brewed with noble […]

The post Brewery Ommegang: Iron Throne, Ep. 185 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Rohrbach Brewing Company, Ep. 180
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Since Beer America TV has split headquarters in both Rochester, New York and Savannah, Georgia, we thought we would highlight a local Rochester brewery in this week’s episode . Opening their doors in 1991, the Rohrbach Brewing Company can stake claim in being Rochester’s original craft brewery! Watch and listen as owner John Urlaub explains […]

The post Rohrbach Brewing Company, Ep. 180 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Southern Tier Brewing: Big Red (Imperial Red), Ep. 163
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We love our fans at Beer America TV, and this week we were sent a beer by Woody Durnell who lives in Central NY . We’re familiar with Southern Tier Brewing Company having reviewed their Creme Brulee, so we were just as excited to try out the Imperial Red! Big and malty with excellent use […]

The post Southern Tier Brewing: Big Red (Imperial Red), Ep. 163 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Genesee Brewing: Bock Beer, Ep. 142
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
There is nothing better to the Beer America TV team of Paul Leone and John Pinkerton then receiving a package of beer in the mail. Even better is when one of our viewers sends it!! This week we discuss Genesee Bock Beer thanks to our good friend Brian Stiehler from Rochester New York . As […]

The post Genesee Brewing: Bock Beer, Ep. 142 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Captain Lawrence Brewing: Birra DeCicco, Ep. 132
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Just north of New York City comes another brewery making a big impression on the American Craft brewing landscape. This week we’re talking about Birra DeCicco from Captain Lawrence Brewing Company in Pleasantville NY. Birra DeCicco is described as a Malt Beverage brewed with Chestnut Honey and Jam, but we can tell you that there […]

The post Captain Lawrence Brewing: Birra DeCicco, Ep. 132 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Captain Lawrence Barrel Select American Sour Ale, Ep. 111
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week our good friend Vince Becker brings a beer from Pleasantville,  NY to our little corner of the world . Captain Lawrence Barrel Select American Sour Ale is just that, sour, but make no mistake, if you enjoy this style of beer, this one is for you! It’s full of flavor and tart for […]

The post Captain Lawrence Barrel Select American Sour Ale, Ep. 111 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Old Slugger Pale Ale – Cooperstown Brewing, Ep. 78
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week we take a swing at Old Slugger, the flagship beer of the Cooperstown Brewing Company . Old Slugger is a well balanced pale ale brewed in the English tradition and true to the style. If you ever decide to visit the Baseball Hall of Fame, don’t forget to stop by and try all their […]

The post Old Slugger Pale Ale – Cooperstown Brewing, Ep. 78 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Cooperstown Brewing Company – Ep. 76
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
When you think of Cooperstown, New York, you most certainly think of the Baseball Hall of Fame, and, for beer lovers, Brewery Ommegang. But there is another hidden treasure just a few miles down the road for craft beer lovers, and thats the Cooperstown Brewing Company. Founded in 1994, their baseball themed beers are the […]

The post Cooperstown Brewing Company – Ep. 76 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
